title.en: All the primeval demon apes were stunned, is th...

content.en:
"What, the patriarch is an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level genius!!"

All the primeval demon apes were stunned, is the patriarch so demonic?

However, the patriarch has fought with other powerhouses more than once, and even lost several times, and he has never broken out eight times with the strength of the Blood Transformation Realm Ancient level!

In their eyes, the patriarch was just an ordinary eight-time blood transformation realm.

But now, the patriarch suddenly burst out with the strength of an ancient-level genius, which really frightened them, and they immediately became excited.

The patriarch is so powerful, hasn't their primeval demon ape clan risen?

"Eight Blood Transformation Realm primitive-level geniuses, I'm not afraid of you!

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor said coldly.

The two sides collided together in an instant.

However, as soon as they fought, the face of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor changed.

Under the superposition of Ye Tian's Ancient Golden Body Technique and the Ancient Starlight Technique, the power of this punch exploded to a very terrifying level.

The most important thing is that Ye Tian's arm has completed bone transformation in countless bones, causing his strength to be very terrifying.

As a result, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was shattered by a punch that shattered the immeasurable bones of his body.

"Bone !!"

Hitomi still doesn't understand, this primeval demon ape has actually completed all the bone transformation of his right arm.

He couldn't believe it!

If an ancient-level genius wants to complete the bone transformation, he must create a top-notch ancient bone technique, and the ancient bone technique cannot be taught to others, and even the ancient golden inscription cannot be passed on to others, unless it is the existence of the bone transformation realm, and only at a certain price can the ancient golden inscription be engraved on some special items, so that other blood transformation realm powerhouses can comprehend the ancient golden inscription.

But under normal circumstances, no bone transformation realm exists that is willing to engrave a large number of ancient gold inscriptions.

Even his master only inscribed dozens of ancient gold inscriptions on Taikoo Mountain.

If you want to obtain a large number of ancient gold inscriptions, you can only enter the ancient gold tablets again and again, understand the ancient gold inscriptions one by one, and then slowly create the ancient bone technique after returning.

But if he wants to create a top-notch primeval bone technique, it is too difficult, he has not succeeded in creating a top-notch primeval bone technique before, and the ordinary primeval bone technique has created two, but it is meaningless.

And this primeval demon ape has completed the bone transformation of the immeasurable bones in his right arm, how many top-notch primeval bone techniques have been created!

The point is, he had never seen this primeval demon ape break into the realm of the primeval golden tablet at all, and he had never even been to the primeval golden tablet, where did so many primeval golden inscriptions come from!

Click!!!

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was not an opponent at all, his body was shattered again and again, and it was too late to recover.

Moreover, the injuries caused by the Ancient Art were already difficult to recover.

Therefore, in the blink of an eye, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was already seriously injured and dying.

"You dare to kill me, my master is the Lord of Taigu Mountain!!!

Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor panicked, he wanted to escape.

However, Ye Tian's speed was too fast, and the Ancient Starlight Technique was known for its speed, so the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor couldn't run.

If he still has the chance to save his life in the Universal Tower, then he can indeed escape.

It's a pity that he didn't have three chances to save his life.

"Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, if you dare to kill our ancient demon ape clan, you will have to die!!"

Ye Tian pretended to say.

"If you kill me, it will also bring disaster to the entire primeval demon ape clan!"

Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor Dao.

However, Ye Tian ignored it at all.

At this time, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was asking for help from his master, the Ancient Mountain Lord.

But the Lord of Taigu Mountain is coming, and it will take time!

Bang!

Under another blow, the body of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was directly and completely shattered, and it could no longer be repaired, and its will was worn out little by little.

In the end, the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor fell.

Such an ancient-level genius was killed, but there was no way to resurrect it.

After killing the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, the Ancient Demon Ape Clan was extremely excited, they didn't understand the background of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and the consequences of this time, they only felt that the patriarch was powerful.

Ye Tian didn't choose to run away, he wanted to be killed by the Taigu Mountain Lord openly, so as to ensure that the Taigu Mountain Lord would not continue to investigate.

......

Ancient territorial waters, ancient mountains.

The Ancient Mountain Lord received a distress message from the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and immediately frowned.

"What trouble is this rebel causing again?"

However, to be able to make the Hitomi Heavenly Ancestor ask for help, he must really be in danger.

As a result, the Ancient Mountain Lord left the Ancient Territorial Sea and rushed to the Ancient Demon Ape Clan as fast as he could.

Soon, he arrived at the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and felt the dissipating aura of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, coupled with the fact that he couldn't contact the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, he had a bad premonition in his heart.

So, he deduced the life and death of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor.

"Hitomi Heart, it's fallen!"

The Lord of the Ancient Mountains showed a hint of sadness.

Although the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was very ruthless, and even caused a lot of trouble, he even personally suppressed and sealed the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor for a period of time.

But in any case, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor was also one of his most proud disciples, and now he was killed.

Rumble!!!!

The aura of the Ancient Mountain Lord permeated the entire territory of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, and even Ye Tian was suppressed by the aura of the Ancient Mountain Lord.

"This is the Bone Transformation Realm!"

Ye Tian was surprised, this aura was too terrifying, far surpassing the primeval-level genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm!

"You're the one who killed my apprentice?"

The Lord of the Ancient Mountains asked.

"Yes, he killed many of my Ancient Demon Ape Clan, damn it!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"If you kill my apprentice, you deserve to die!"

The Ancient Mountain Lord didn't care what kind of demonic primeval genius Ye Tian was, and directly attacked.

Rumble!!!

The Ancient Mountain Lord punched him, and with a speed beyond Ye Tian's imagination, the blow smashed him to pieces and turned into nothingness, leaving no trace at all.

Spike!

Then, the Lord of the Ancient Mountain wiped out the Ancient Demon Ape Clan.

After that, the Lord of Taikoo Mountain collected the remnants of the body of the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor and returned to Taikoo Mountain, the primeval territorial waters.

......

This battle has attracted the attention of many forces, especially the Lord of the Ancient Mountains has left the Ancient Territorial Waters of the Ancient Seas, who doesn't care about such a big thing?

Soon, the news came.

The Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor fell, and the patriarch of the Ancient Demon Ape Clan, Ape Fu, turned out to be an Ancient Genius, and they were all shocked.

The White Shadow Elephant Clan.

Patriarch Moon Scar heard that Ape Fu was an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level genius, and the first one felt that it was impossible.

"Impossible, if Ape Fu is an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius, he doesn't need to show much strength, he only needs to expose the strength of an eight-time Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Genius, and he can kill me in seconds. But I've fought him a lot, and he doesn't have such terrifying strength at all!"

Moonscar was shocked.
